_instructions: Merge these hooks into your project's .claude/settings.json or ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key. These hooks enforce R.Code workflow discipline automatically.

hooks.prompt: Check if there are uncommitted changes that should be committed. If significant work was done (code written, files modified) but not committed, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Uncommitted changes detected. Please commit before stopping."}. Otherwise respond with {"ok": true}.

Check if the project has a .rcode/ directory. If yes, check if .rcode/agent-log.md was updated this session. If the agent worked on code or issues but did NOT append to the agent log, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "This is a R.Code project. Please run /handoff before ending your session to preserve context for the next agent."}. If the log was updated or no significant work was done, respond with {"ok": true}.

hooks.command: if [ -d .rcode ]; then echo 'R.Code: Remember to update PROJECT-STATUS.md if this completes an issue.'; fi

if [ -d .rcode ] && [ -f .rcode/scope-manifest.json ]; then BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if echo "$BRANCH" | grep -q 'issue-'; then echo 'R.Code: Scope guard active. Ensure changes are within issue scope.'; fi; fi
